scores.correctness_notes: Priority order is wrong: agent lists 'error > blocked > waiting > maintenance > active' but the correct order is 'error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active' (maintenance outranks waiting). Also omits the important constraint that calling add_status() with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus is an error. The description 'emits before each status update' is also slightly inaccurate (it fires at end of every hook).
scores.hallucination_notes: No fabricated APIs, but the priority order inversion (waiting vs maintenance) is a minor factual inaccuracy rather than a hallucinated item.
